2604.08707.title: Parameterized Complexity Of Representing Models Of MSO Formulas
2604.08707.paper_summary: Monadic second order logic (MSO2) plays an important role in parameterized complexity due to the Courcelle's theorem. This theorem states that the problem of checking if a given graph has a property specified by a given MSO2 formula can be solved by a parameterized linear time algorithm with respect to the treewidth of the graph and the size of the formula. We extend this result by showing that models of MSO2 formula with free variables can be represented with a decision diagram whose size is parameterized linear in the above mentioned parameter. In particular, we show a parameterized linear upper bound on the size of a sentential decision diagram (SDD) when treewidth is considered and a parameterized linear upper bound on the size of an ordered binary decision diagram (OBDD) when considering the pathwidth in the parameter. In addition, building on a lower bound on the size of OBDD by Razgon (2014), we show that there is an MSO2 formula and a class of graphs with bounded treewidth which do not admit an OBDD with the size parameterized by the treewidth. Our result offers a new perspective on the Courcelle's theorem and connects it to the area of knowledge representation.
2604.08707.paper_summary_zh: 單子第二階邏輯（MSO2）在參數化複雜度中扮演著重要角色，這是由於Courcelle定理。這個定理指出，檢查給定圖形是否具有由給定MSO2公式指定的性質的問題，可以通過一個參數化的線性時間算法來解決，該算法與圖形的樹寬和公式的大小有關。我們通過顯示具有自由變數的MSO2公式的模型可以用一個決策圖來表示，該決策圖的大小在上述參數中是參數化的線性來擴展這一結果。特別地，我們展示了在考慮樹寬時，句子決策圖（SDD）大小的參數化線性上界，以及在考慮路徑寬度時，排序二元決策圖（OBDD）大小的參數化線性上界。此外，基於Razgon（2014）對OBDD大小的下界，我們顯示存在一個MSO2公式和一類具有有界樹寬的圖形，這些圖形不承認大小由樹寬參數化的OBDD。我們的結果為Courcelle定理提供了一個新的視角，並將其與知識表示領域聯繫起來。
2604.08707.author: Petr Kučera et.al.
